feat.name: Soaring Dynamo
feat.text: You've built clockwork wings or jets into your dynamo, allowing you to use your prosthesis to fly. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed. Each minute of flight reduces the operational time of your sterling dynamo by 1 hour, measured from the first time you use the Fly action in a given minute.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
